channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Netanyahu authorizes direct talks with Lebanon in potential boost to ceasefire efforts - AP News
item.description:
1. Netanyahu authorizes direct talks with Lebanon in potential boost to ceasefire efforts  AP News
  2. Live updates: Netanyahu approves talks with Lebanon after Israeli strikes imperil Iran ceasefire  AP News
  3. Saudi Arabia Details Energy Output, Capacity Cuts From Attacks  Bloomberg.com
  4. Netanyahu calls for talks with Lebanon after bombardment of Beirut threatens ceasefire  The Guardian
  5. U.S. to lead ceasefire talks between Lebanon and Israel in D.C. as Lebanon emerges as potential spoiler to Iran deal  CBS News

item.title: The deadliest 10 minutes in decades: Lebanese reel from Israeli strikes that killed hundreds - The Guardian
item.description:
1. The deadliest 10 minutes in decades: Lebanese reel from Israeli strikes that killed hundreds  The Guardian
  2. European Leaders Demand That U.S. Cease-Fire With Iran Include Lebanon  The New York Times
  3. Middle East crisis live: Netanyahu says ‘no ceasefire in Lebanon’ as Israel attacks ‘Hezbollah launch sites’  The Guardian
  4. What is Israel’s war in Lebanon and why could it shatter the Iran ceasefire?  CNN
  5. Israeli military says it has killed nephew of Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem  Reuters

item.title: Hungary voters want new EU approach, but tough on Ukraine - DW.com
item.description:
1. Hungary voters want new EU approach, but tough on Ukraine  DW.com

  4. A Last Chance for Hungary: Orban’s Mafia State Could Fall—or Cement Itself  Foreign Affairs
  5. Hungary's election could end Orban era and reshape its place in Europe  Reuters

item.title: Argentina passes bill loosening protection of its glaciers - BBC
item.description:
1. Argentina passes bill loosening protection of its glaciers  BBC

  3. Argentina’s glacier law review opens door to mining push  Financial Times
  4. Argentine MPs approve Milei-backed bill to allow mining in glaciers  France 24
  5. Argentina passes reform to ease mining activity in glacier regions  Reuters

item.title: 3 Russian Submarines Detected Near Britain Were Spying, U.K. Says - The New York Times
item.description:
1. 3 Russian Submarines Detected Near Britain Were Spying, U.K. Says  The New York Times
  2. UK says Russia ran submarine operation over cables and pipelines  BBC

  4. UK navy foiled Russian submarines surveying undersea cables, defence minister says  The Guardian
  5. UK says it deployed military to deter Russian submarines from attack on undersea cables  Reuters

item.title: A deal or a mirage? Trump’s Iran ceasefire collides with chaos on the ground - CNN
item.description:
1. A deal or a mirage? Trump’s Iran ceasefire collides with chaos on the ground  CNN
  2. ‘This War Isn’t Over’: 3 Opinion Writers Debate What Has to Happen Next in Iran  The New York Times
  3. What’s in the Iran war ceasefire? The two sides can’t seem to even agree on that.  CNN
  4. A Closer Look at Iran’s 10 Demands—and Which the U.S. Might Accept  WSJ
  5. Iran’s president says ceasefire was approved by the supreme leader  The Times of Israel

item.title: Chinese FM spokesperson responds to report that China encouraged Iran to accept ceasefire, promised to act as guarantor - Global Times
item.description:
1. Chinese FM spokesperson responds to report that China encouraged Iran to accept ceasefire, promised to act as guarantor  Global Times

  4. China Pressed Iran Toward Cease-Fire, Iranian Officials Say  The New York Times
  5. Xi Helps Trump on Iran War as China Assists With Ceasefire Bid  Bloomberg.com

item.title: In the Trump era, everybody's talking about 'soft power.' But ... what is it exactly? - NPR
item.description:
1. In the Trump era, everybody's talking about 'soft power.' But ... what is it exactly?  NPR

  3. Mellen Duffy Tanamly & Arthur Greenberg: Closing USAID and its deadly consequences  UnionLeader.com
  4. Devex Pro Insider: The foreign aid blame game  Devex
  5. Dark Money for Soft Power  Puck

item.title: Hormuz Traffic Still Blocked as Iran Tries to Formalize Control - Bloomberg.com
item.description:

item.title: Mass drowning of chicks puts emperor penguins at risk of extinction - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Mass drowning of chicks puts emperor penguins at risk of extinction  The Guardian

item.title: NATO's Rutte told allies Trump wants Hormuz commitments within days, diplomats say - CNBC
item.description:

item.title: Iran's president says Israeli strikes on Lebanon render negotiations meaningless - Reuters
item.description:

item.title: UK rejects tolls on Strait of Hormuz - politico.eu
item.description:

item.title: Greece will ban all kids under 15 from using social media - Engadget
item.description:

item.title: U.S. Admiral Trolls Trump Over Bizarre Plan to Cash in on Iran - The Daily Beast

item.title: France to increase defense spending by $42 billion, mulls new tank effort - Breaking Defense
item.description:
1. France to increase defense spending by $42 billion, mulls new tank effort  Breaking Defense

  3. France to Expand Munitions Stocks in €36 Billion Defense Boost  Bloomberg.com
  4. Exiting American Hegemony Under A French Nuclear Umbrella  Center for International Policy
  5. France aims to spend €76.3B on defense in 2030  politico.eu
